surfaces_and_borders.input: bg-black border border-white/10 focus:border-yellow-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500

button.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-yellow-400 transition-colors
button.whatsapp: bg-green-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-green-400 transition-colors

accessibility.contrast: APCA standard compliant, primary yellow accent over black backgrounds
accessibility.focus_states: All inputs and buttons must have visible focus rings
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' (e.g. data-testid='submit-discovery-btn')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid tool where the Hero Section feels like a tactical command center, followed seamlessly by the Discovery Tool.
Use Archetype 4 (Swiss & High Contrast). The UI should be predominantly black (#0A0A0A) with Warning Yellow (#EAB308) used sparingly for core actions (Search, Run Snipe).
Headings MUST use Cabinet Grotesk (fallback to purely geometric sans if unavailable). Body text uses Satoshi.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Marketing sections (Hero), and heavily customized Shadcn components for the functional part (Forms, Inputs, Table).
Grid strategy: Use 'Control Room' grid for the tool section. The Discovery Form takes 4 columns, and the Results Table takes 8 columns on large screens.
CRITICAL: The results table must look like a high-end data terminal. Sharp 1px borders, no soft shadows, strict monochrome with bright green for the WhatsApp CTA button.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements, e.g., `data-testid='business-name-input'`, `data-testid='search-leads-button'`, `data-testid='whatsapp-link-row-1'`.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Do NOT use generic Vercel gradients. If needed, use extremely subtle structural radial glows.
Ensure 'Run Snipe' or main CTA interactions have clear loading states.
